M6A M6A_FOOT_PROB (M6A) Resident Has 1 or More Foot Problems CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - resident has one or more goot problems. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
433 M6B M6B_INFECT_FOOT (M6B) Infection of Foot CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - infection of foot - e.g., cellulitis, etc. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
434 M6C M6C_LESIONS_FOOT (M6C) Open Lesions on Foot CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days -
